description: Evaluates whether the breaking-change-reviewer skill catches contract drift on public exports while ignoring internal-only changes and purely additive optional fields.

cases.name: required-param-added-to-public-export
cases.notes: Public export at the package barrel (src/index.ts) gained a required positional parameter. Every existing caller now fails to type-check. Classic breaking change.

cases.name: removed-public-export-no-deprecation
cases.notes: `legacyCreateClient` was a public export at the package barrel and is being removed outright with no @deprecated pass or major-version note. Breaking.

cases.name: additive-optional-field-on-internal-helper
cases.notes: Internal-only helper (`src/internal/`, not re-exported) gains a purely additive optional field. Not a breaking change under any reasonable contract.

cases.name: rename-internal-file-no-barrel-impact
cases.notes: File rename + symbol rename of an internal-only helper. No barrel export exists for it, so no external consumer is affected. Not a breaking change.

cases.name: widened-return-type-on-public-api
cases.notes: Return type widened from ParsedToken to ParsedToken | null on a public export. Every caller that wrote `parseBearer(h).sub` now type-errors. Classic signature-widening breaking change.
